findings_history.notes: 64 tests. Fixed nodeContextMenu backdrop. mindmapApi service tests. Zero assertion failures.
Fixed useGraphInit.helpers.test.ts Vite transform error. Added mindmapAiApi.ts contract tests (11 tests). 69 files / 2270 tests.
140 new tests. Hardened performance flake. 72 files / 2410 tests.
92 new tests + devWarn helper, 33 callsites refactored. 74 files / 2507 tests.
AiTutorPanel coverage 20→48. Fixed 2 silent-crash i18n bugs. 74 files / 2537 tests.
GraphTemplatePanel coverage 21→47. Fixed 3rd silent-crash i18n bug. 74 files / 2563 tests.
GraphSidebar coverage 27→58. Defect-class regression EXPANDED — caught 4 more silent-crash sites. 74 files / 2588 tests.
useDragConnect coverage 35→67. Pointer-state-machine pinned. 74 files / 2620 tests.

NodeAnnotationModal coverage 16→47 (was lowest test:src ratio at 0.35): added 31 tests covering pt/es i18n parity (compact comma-separated key format required a tweaked regex; locked in as a re-usable helper pattern), save flow contracts (PATCH-on-existing vs POST-on-new dispatch with response capture preventing duplicate POSTs, content.trim() before persist, 1000-char cap with 950-char red-warning threshold, encodeURIComponent on keyword_id, dual response-shape support, Error.message → toast extraction), delete flow (existing-note-only Delete button, savingRef double-action guard, local-state cleanup), keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl/Cmd+Enter save with handleSaveRef stability, Escape via safeCloseRef, both call preventDefault), body scroll lock that captures+restores prior overflow values (not hardcoded 'auto'), backdrop-click triggers safeClose (unsaved-changes guard), discard-confirm uses ConfirmDialog with z-[60]. Phase 2 false-positive sweep on aliased imports — `Circle as CircleIcon`/`Map as MapIcon`/`Minimize as MinimizeIcon` correctly used. Result: 74 files / 2651 tests, ALL PASSING.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2651/2651 assertions pass; NodeAnnotationModal save/delete/i18n/scroll-lock/keyboard contracts pinned; 7 cycles of clean defect-class scans
